title: Band-e Amir Explorer
subtitle: Discover Afghanistan's first national park and the Bamiyan Buddha niches
summary: A 5-day journey into the heart of the Hindu Kush to explore Band-e Amir's turquoise lakes and the iconic Bamiyan valley.
highlights: Band-e Amir national park;Bamiyan Buddha niches;Shahr-e Gholghola;Dragon Valley;Local village homestay

title: Kabul City Break
subtitle: Uncover the ancient and modern layers of Afghanistan's capital
summary: A 3-day cultural immersion in Kabul covering the old city bazaars, Babur's Garden, and the National Museum.
highlights: Babur's Garden;National Museum;Chicken Street bazaar;Darul Aman Palace;Wazir Akbar Khan
included_note: Boutique hotel accommodation;All breakfasts;Expert local guide

title: Herat Silk Road Journey
subtitle: Walk in the footsteps of Tamerlane and the Timurid sultans
summary: A 4-day immersive journey through Herat, one of the ancient world's great cities and a jewel of the Silk Road.
highlights: Herat Citadel;Friday Mosque;Musalla Complex;Gawhar Shad Mausoleum;Craft workshops

title: North Afghanistan Loop
subtitle: From the Blue Mosque to ancient Balkh and the Amu Darya
summary: A 6-day exploration of northern Afghanistan from the glittering Blue Mosque of Mazar-i-Sharif to the ruins of ancient Balkh.
highlights: Blue Mosque;Ancient Balkh ruins;Nawruz celebrations;Haibak Buddhist caves;Khulm village

title: Wakhan Corridor Trekking
subtitle: High-altitude adventure through the roof of the world
summary: A 10-day high-altitude trekking expedition through the remote Wakhan Corridor following the ancient Silk Road.
highlights: Wakhan Corridor;Pamir plateau;Marco Polo sheep sightings;Kirghiz yurt camps;Ancient forts
included_note: All camping/guesthouse accommodation;All meals;Expert mountain guide;Mule support

title: Kabul & Bamiyan Combo
subtitle: The best of the capital and the high valleys in one trip
summary: Combine Kabul's rich urban culture with the breathtaking landscapes of Bamiyan in this 7-day highlights tour.
highlights: Kabul city;Babur's Garden;Band-e Amir;Dragon Valley;Shahr-e Gholghola;Qargha Lake
